Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Robert E. Dunne, for failure to comply with Local Rule 4.3 (F & K) is scheduled today. There being no appearance. Court ordered Sanctions in the amount of $250.00, issued to Robert E. Dunne, Esq., for failure to appear at the Order to Show Cause Hearing today, and for failure to appear at the Early Settlement Program Conference on 11/2/01. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212) Written sanction order not issued. Dismissal w/prej. complaint filed 2/21/02.
